ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "thumbnail1" TEXT /* URL of the first thumbnail image */,
  "thumbnail2" TEXT /* URL of the second thumbnail image */,
  "thumbnail3" TEXT /* URL of the third thumbnail image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was uploaded */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the video */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID who uploaded the video */,
  "licensing_rights" INTEGER /* Whether the video has licensing rights */,
  "monetization_status" INTEGER /* Whether the video is monetized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Educational, Entertaining) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user is subscribed to notifications */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Creator, Viewer) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_categories" (
  "video_id" TEXT /* Reference to the video ID */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* Reference to the video ID */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the video */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the video */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments for the video */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the video */,
  "watch_time" TEXT /* Total watch time for the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel ID */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the user subscribed to the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channels_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_tags" (
  "video_id" TEXT /* Reference to the video ID */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id", "tag_id")
)
